businesses.name: Zubair Plumbing Services
businesses.address: Hazir & sons Sanitary Store, 196-A, Scheme Mor Multan Rd, Sabzazar Lahore, 54500, Pakistan

reviews.author: Khadija Imran
reviews.text: Excellent service 10/10. Arrived on time, was friendly and respectful, did an amazing job and leave a very good impression. Would contact again if needed 👍👍. A highly recommended and professional man

reviews.author: Zakaria Khan
reviews.text: Well trained and professional staff. Timely and effective service. Highly recommended.

reviews.author: Dua Razzaq
reviews.text: Recommended 10/10!!! Excellent work! Had a super tiresome and poor experience with other plumbers but this team managed everything from scratch and quite cost-effectively. May they flourish further. 🙏

reviews.author: Aasim Khan
reviews.text: Plumber arrived in 30 minutes, fixed the pipe efficiently with quality parts, and cleaned up afterward—no mess left. Professional, affordable

I am very satisfied with the plumbing service done at my home today. The team was quick, professional, and very polite. They worked in a dynamic way and handled … More

reviews.author: Ruby Zahoor
reviews.text: Highlige recommended. Professional man he knows what he is doing. Very honest and he always keep his commitment.we are very satisfied by his work👍He fixed our drain issue plus he installed pump and smart switch which no one even knows about.And even he drive extra miles to reach us. He always reply back .

businesses.name: Asif plumbing services
businesses.address: Hazir & Sons, 196A M, Multan Rd, Lahore, 54570, Pakistan

reviews.author: Kashif Ahmed
reviews.text: Asif is very hardworking. I had a lot of plumbing work done recently and he did wonderful satisfactory job. He completes his work with dedication until the problem is resolved.

reviews.author: Menahil Shahid
reviews.text: He came within 5 minutes of calling. Worked tirelessly and solved our issue within a few hours. If not for him we would have to dig up tiles and pipes. Diagnosed and solved other issues in the house too. Best plumbing service in all of Lahore

reviews.author: sami hayat
